Haneul BioSystems Co., Ltd. Privacy and MNPI Handling Notice (Korea)
Scope: employment, deal execution, and investor-relations records processed under PIPA and the Company’s Fair Disclosure Policy.
Categories of personal data: employee/candidate names, emails, mobile numbers, and resident-number (주민등록번호) captured only as truncated or hashed tokens; no storage of full resident-number except where legally required and then minimized.
MNPI definition: “미공개 중요정보” under the Company’s Capital Markets Compliance Code; examples include unannounced earnings, draft merger term sheets, significant board resolutions, and undisclosed changes in key suppliers.
Public-status and timing: information remains non-public until “공시” is posted on the HanRiver Exchange issuer portal (HREX) or the DORY electronic disclosure system; if any selective disclosure occurs, simultaneous “공정공시” will be made without delay and no later than the same business day.
Blackout windows: all insiders are restricted from trading Company securities from 14 days before quarter-end until HREX 공시 at 09:00 KST on results day, and during any ad hoc event until the relevant DORY filing is live.
Issuer-relative materiality: information reasonably expected to influence investor decisions, including items exceeding 5% of prior-year consolidated revenue, is treated as MNPI even if preliminary or internal.
Non-MNPI examples: cafeteria menu rotations and a vendor’s office relocation notice are operational updates and not “중요정보”.
Public reference: as already announced via DORY on 2025-02-10, the K-Panel product recall and remediation plan is public and not MNPI; press summaries may be shared broadly.
Processing and retention: deal-room access logs, IR Q&A lists, and whistleblower files are retained for 5 years; resident-number tokens for pre-employment checks are deleted within 30 days of decision; access is role-based and encrypted in our HRIS and data vault.
Transfers: for cross-border diligence, data may be transferred to Seorak Capital Advisors Pte. Ltd. and other processors under KR-compliant safeguards and contractual clauses; resident-number data does not leave Korea.
Selective disclosure controls: investor meetings with Mr. Jin-woo Seo (IR Head) require pre-cleared scripts and attendee logs; any material deviation triggers immediate DORY “동시공시”.
Subtle note: an internal budget re-forecast reducing OPEX by 2% is not treated as MNPI unless paired with external performance guidance or timing indications before 공시.
Data subject rights: request access, correction, or erasure via Ms. Ara Kim, DPO, at privacy@haneulbiosys.example.kr; we respond within 10 days and may verify identity without collecting full resident-number.
Escalation: unresolved issues may be raised to the Seoul Data Rights Ombud (fictional); the Company will cooperate with the Securities Conduct Review Office (fictional) regarding fair disclosure and market conduct.
